_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater on every miner startup. To add a new platform: add an entry under `platforms`. To force-upgrade across a fork boundary: set `min_required_sha256` on the relevant platform entry. v1 single-binary schema (top-level sha256+url) is still recognized by the updater as legacy (treated as x86_64-linux); the v2 platforms-dict schema below is preferred and supports any platform key the wrapper can detect.
notes: v0.4.7 - GPU saturation: PR58 kernel optimizations (~5.4x on Pascal, ~3x on 5090, byte-exact factored math) + C4 continuous-feed RunOneJob (collect all shares per slice). x86_64-linux bumped to btx-prebuilds-v0.32.5; aarch64-linux/aarch64-linux-cuda12/arm64-darwin remain on v0.32.2 pending their respective builds. KAT-verified bit-equivalent to internal ship-base 147e59f7 (12/12 shares match).

x86_64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.5 + PR58 GPU saturation kernels (byte-exact factored math, ~5.4x Pascal/~3x 5090) + C4 continuous-feed RunOneJob. CUDA 12.8, archs sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120. LTO enabled. Built on home-1070, KAT-verified bit-equivalent (12/12 shares) vs internal ship-base 147e59f7.

aarch64-linux.notes: Default aarch64-linux entry. CUDA 13.0, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120;sm_121. Covers GB10/Spark + RTX Blackwell consumer. Requires CUDA 13.0+ runtime.

aarch64-linux-cuda12.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda12. CUDA 12.8 build, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (no sm_121 — use cuda13 build for GB10).

arm64-darwin.notes: Apple Silicon Metal backend. CI verifies cpu_digest == metal_digest == reference_digest before publish.
